body_html:
thanks for keepimg me up

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

From: Zwirn, Dan [mailto:dan.zwirn@dbzco.com]
Sent: Thursday, July 27, 2006 9:30 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Mohan Murjani

Jeffrey

We are drafting out a polite reply to him,
expressiing our inability to
do a pure PE deal given the very green field nature
of the business.
This reply will go out today.

We did consider inventory / receivable financing,
and given the fact
that we will not do it for more than 50% LTV, he
would still need to
bring in equity money to fund the rest.

We'll recommend that he follow the AIM route.

Dan
